name: CodeEditor
description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

api.name: CodeEditor
api.description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Source language. Currently supported: csharp, javascript, typescript, html, css, json, markdown, xml, sql, python, plaintext. Unknown values fall back to plaintext.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: light | dark | auto (follows page theme via the `dark` class on <html>).

parameters.name: ShowMinimap
parameters.description: Shows a scrollbar-side minimap of the document. CodeMirror 6 has no built-in minimap, so this lazily loads the @@replit/codemirror-minimap extension from EsmBase on first enable. If that import fails (e.g. offline with no self-hosted copy of the package) the editor degrades gracefully — the rest of the editor keeps working, just without a minimap. Toggling at runtime adds/removes the extension without losing selection or scroll position.

parameters.name: EsmBase
parameters.description: Base URL the CodeMirror core, language packs, theme, and minimap are imported from. Defaults to the public esm.sh CDN. Point this at a self-hosted ESM mirror (or a path served by your own app) for air-gapped / offline / strict-CSP deployments — e.g. EsmBase="/_content/MyApp/esm" or EsmBase="https://esm.myco.internal". A trailing slash is optional. When null, falls back to the global window.lumeoCdn.codeMirrorBase override (if set) and then esm.sh.

parameters.name: OnChange
parameters.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

events.name: OnChange
events.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

mdSummary:
# CodeEditor

Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

**Package:** `Lumeo.CodeEditor` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/code-editor

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CodeEditor | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | Language | `string` | `"plaintext"` | Source language. Currently supported: csharp, javascript, typescript, html, css, json, markdown, xml, sql, python, plaintext. Unknown values fall back to plaintext. |
| CodeEditor | Theme | `string` | `"auto"` | light \| dark \| auto (follows page theme via the `dark` class on <html>). |
| CodeEditor | Height | `string` | `"400px"` |  |
| CodeEditor | LineNumbers | `bool` | `true` |  |
| CodeEditor | ReadOnly | `bool` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | ShowMinimap | `bool` | `` | Shows a scrollbar-side minimap of the document. CodeMirror 6 has no built-in minimap, so this lazily loads the @@replit/codemirror-minimap extension from EsmBase on first enable. If that import fails (e.g. offline with no self-hosted copy of the package) the editor degrades gracefully — the rest of the editor keeps working, just without a minimap. Toggling at runtime adds/removes the extension without losing selection or scroll position. |
| CodeEditor | EsmBase | `string?` | `` | Base URL the CodeMirror core, language packs, theme, and minimap are imported from. Defaults to the public esm.sh CDN. Point this at a self-hosted ESM mirror (or a path served by your own app) for air-gapped / offline / strict-CSP deployments — e.g. EsmBase="/_content/MyApp/esm" or EsmBase="https://esm.myco.internal". A trailing slash is optional. When null, falls back to the global window.lumeoCdn.codeMirrorBase override (if set) and then esm.sh. |
| CodeEditor | TabSize | `int` | `4` |  |
| CodeEditor | UseTabs | `bool` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | WordWrap | `string` | `"off"` | "off" \| "on" |
| CodeEditor | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | OnChange | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs. |
| CodeEditor | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CodeEditor | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OnChange` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<CodeEditor />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/CodeEditor/CodeEditor.razor`
